main.description: Defines a discussion topic. Owned by the PDS service DID. Links to a member list for tracking participants.

topicId.description: Unique identifier for this topic. Typically a chain reference like 'task:42' or 'proposal:7', but can be any string.

title.description: Human-readable title for this discussion topic.

description.description: Optional description or context for the topic.

listUri.description: URI of the canonical participant list for this topic.

creator.description: DID of the user who created this topic.
